vpclattice.targetgroup.CfnAbout:
Creates a target group. A target group is a collection of targets, or compute resources, that run your application or service. A target group can only be used by a single service.

For more information, see [Target groups](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc-lattice/latest/ug/target-groups.html) in the *Amazon VPC Lattice User Guide*.

vpclattice.targetgroup.Name.Description: The name of the target group. The name must be unique within the account. The valid characters are a-z, 0-9, and hyphens (-). You can't use a hyphen as the first or last character, or immediately after another hyphen.  If you don't specify a name, CloudFormation generates one. However, if you specify a name, and later want to replace the resource, you must specify a new name.

vpclattice.targetgroup.Tags.Description: The tags for the target group.
